description: Strikes at $0.50, $1.00, $5.00 with spot $1.50. The OTM fallback expansion is capped at $1.80 (+20% of spot) and finds nothing above spot, so the provider cannot build a valid NTM slice. Expected: SparseChain.

setup.note: Only $0.50 and $1.00 qualify on the put side (within -20% = $1.20). The call side has $5.00 which is +233% of spot, well past the ±20% cap. After capped expansion, the call side has zero qualifying strikes, so SparseChain is returned.
